ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, pure sea salt, no fortification

ingredients_text: Milk chocolate contains cocoa solids 51% min. / milk solids 14% min. Organic milk chocolate 94% (organic cane sugar, organic cocoa mass, organic cocoa butter, organic dried milk, organic vanilla paste) & organic butterscotch 6% (organic sugar, organic wheat syrup*, organic butter (milk), organic cream (milk) & sea salt**)
